name: main.py
description:
MRIQC 24.0.0
Automated Quality Control and visual reports for Quality Assessment of structural (T1w, T2w) and functional MRI of the brain.

IMPORTANT: Anonymized quality metrics (IQMs) will be submitted to MRIQC's metrics repository. Submission of IQMs can be disabled using the ``--no-sub`` argument. Please visit https://mriqc.readthedocs.io/en/latest/dsa.html to revise MRIQC's Data Sharing Agreement.

inputs.description: The root folder of a BIDS valid dataset (sub-XXXXX folders should be found at the top level in this folder).
inputs.name: bids_dir

inputs.description: The directory where the output files should be stored. If you are running group level analysis this folder should be prepopulated with the results of the participant level analysis.
inputs.name: output_dir

inputs.description: Level of the analysis that will be performed. Multiple participant level analyses can be run independently (in parallel) using the same output_dir.
inputs.name: analysis_level

inputs.description: Increases log verbosity for each occurrence, debug level is -vvv.
inputs.name: verbose

inputs.description: Use appropriate template for population (Default: "human")
inputs.name: species

inputs.description: A space delimited list of participant identifiers or a single identifier (the sub- prefix can be removed).
inputs.name: participant_label

inputs.description: a JSON file describing custom BIDS input filter using pybids {<suffix>:{<entity>:<filter>,...},...} (https://github.com/bids-standard/pybids/blob/master/src/bids/layout/config/bids.json)
inputs.name: bids_filter_file

inputs.description: Filter input dataset by session ID.
inputs.name: session_id

inputs.description: DEPRECATED - This argument will be disabled. Use ``--bids-filter-file`` instead.
inputs.name: run_id

inputs.description: Filter input dataset by task ID.
inputs.name: task_id

inputs.description: Filter input dataset by MRI type.
inputs.name: modalities

inputs.description: A dataset name.
inputs.name: dsname

inputs.description: Path to an existing PyBIDS database folder, for faster indexing (especially useful for large datasets).
inputs.name: bids_database_dir

inputs.description: Wipe out previously existing BIDS indexing caches, forcing re-indexing.
inputs.name: bids_database_wipe

inputs.description: Disable attempting to get remote files in DataLad datasets.
inputs.name: no_datalad_get

inputs.description: Maximum number of simultaneously running parallel processes executed by *MRIQC* (e.g., several instances of ANTs' registration). However, when ``--nprocs`` is greater or equal to the ``--omp-nthreads`` option, it also sets the maximum number of threads that simultaneously running processes may aggregate (meaning, with ``--nprocs 16 --omp-nthreads 8`` a maximum of two 8-CPU-threaded processes will be running at a given time). Under this mode of operation, ``--nprocs`` sets the maximum number of processors that can be assigned work within an *MRIQC* job, which includes all the processors used by currently running single- and multi-threaded processes. If ``None``, the number of CPUs available will be automatically assigned (which may not be what you want in, e.g., shared systems like a HPC cluster.
inputs.name: nprocs

inputs.description: Maximum number of threads that multi-threaded processes executed by *MRIQC* (e.g., ANTs' registration) can use. If ``None``, the number of CPUs available will be automatically assigned (which may not be what you want in, e.g., shared systems like a HPC cluster.
inputs.name: omp_nthreads

inputs.description: Upper bound memory limit for MRIQC processes.
inputs.name: mem

inputs.description: Use testing settings for a minimal footprint.
inputs.name: testing

inputs.description: Cast the input data to float32 if it's represented in higher precision (saves space and improves performance).
inputs.name: float32

inputs.description: Open Python debugger (pdb) on exceptions.
inputs.name: pdb

inputs.description: Path where intermediate results should be stored.
inputs.name: work_dir

inputs.description: Write workflow graph.
inputs.name: write_graph

inputs.description: Do not run the workflow.
inputs.name: dry_run

inputs.description: Hook up the resource profiler callback to nipype.
inputs.name: resource_monitor

inputs.description: Nipype plugin configuration file.
inputs.name: use_plugin

inputs.description: Nipype crashfile format (Default: "txt")
inputs.name: crashfile_format

inputs.description: Turn off submission of anonymized quality metrics to MRIQC's metrics repository.
inputs.name: no_sub

inputs.description: Email address to include with quality metric submission. (Default: "")
inputs.name: email

inputs.description: IP address where the MRIQC WebAPI is listening.
inputs.name: webapi_url

inputs.description: Port where the MRIQC WebAPI is listening.
inputs.name: webapi_port

inputs.description: Upload will fail if upload is strict.
inputs.name: upload_strict

inputs.description: Opt-out of sending tracking information of this run to the NiPreps developers. This information helps to improve MRIQC and provides an indicator of real world usage  crucial for obtaining funding.
inputs.name: notrack

inputs.description: Use float number precision on ANTs computations.
inputs.name: ants_float

inputs.description: Path to JSON file with settings for ANTs.
inputs.name: ants_settings

inputs.description: Drop DWI runs with fewer orientations than this threshold. (Default: 7)
inputs.name: min_dwi_length

inputs.description: Drop BOLD runs with fewer time points than this threshold. (Default: 5)
inputs.name: min_bold_length

inputs.description: Turn on FFT based spike detector (slow).
inputs.name: fft_spikes_detector

inputs.description: Threshold on framewise displacement estimates to detect outliers. (Default: 0.2)
inputs.name: fd_thres

inputs.description: Deoblique the functional scans during head motion correction preprocessing.
inputs.name: deoblique

inputs.description: Despike the functional scans during head motion correction preprocessing.
inputs.name: despike

inputs.description: DEPRECATED Initial volume in functional timeseries that should be considered for preprocessing.
inputs.name: start_idx

inputs.description: DEPRECATED Final volume in functional timeseries that should be considered for preprocessing.
inputs.name: stop_idx
